calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Motion for Attorneys Fees and Costs.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Ingrid Evans, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Lily N.
No other appearances.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS Plaintiff Lily N.'s Motion for Attorneys' Fees and Costs:
Plaintiff's attorneys fees: $594,003.50
Costs: $13,473.58
To be paid to Plaintiff's counsel.
Order signed in open court.

Amended judgment is filed In favor of Plaintiff Lily N. and against Peter Hopkins as follows:
Damages: $173,550.00
Prejudgment interest: $16,974.64
Attorney fees: $594,003.50
Costs:$13,473.58
Total: $798,001.72

Judgment signed in open court.

Counsel to submit papers regarding Order Sealing Declaration of Bruce Smith.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day, having been continued from October 16, 2017 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Waived at the request of plaintiff's counsel.

Ingrid M. Evans, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Lily N., who was placed under oath and testified.
William Pon, a Sergeant with the San Francisco Police Department, was placed under oath and testified.
Edward Wu, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by the only remaining defendant, Peter Hopkins, an individual.

Notice of Time and Place of Trial, setting trial for Monday, October 17, was filed & served on February 2, 2017. Matter was continued to today, November 20, 2017, as counsel did not have the necessary documentation to go forward at the last calling of the case.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendants Rangnekar Chiropractic, Inc., dba Therapeia, and Aneesh S. Rangnekar, D.C., was filed on October 2, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 16, 2017.
Order Sealing the Unredacted Declaration of Bruce Lazar Smith, Ph.D., ABAP, was filed today, November 20, 2017.

The Court reviewed the following:
(1) Plaintiff's Trial Brief;
(2) Declaration of Linda Aldridge, MA, CMT;
(3) Declaration of Defendant Peter Hopkins as Testimony for Trial;
(4) Declaration of Bethany L; and
(5) Declaration of Bruce Lazar Smith, Ph.D, ABAP.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Lily N., and against defendant Peter Hopkins, an invidicual, follows:

Past/Future Economic Damages - $23,550.00.
Past/Future Non-Economic Damages - $150,000.00.
A/F - Per Noticed Motion.
Costs - Per Memorandum of Costs.

Total - $173,550.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the Proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Assigned To Trial Court
